name: Echoes of The Backrooms: Remastered
short_description: "Echoes of The Backrooms" is an indie horror game that masterfully captures the unsettling atmosphere of the Backrooms and the uncanny eeriness of liminal spaces. This game excels in creating an immersive horror experience with its cinema-quality visuals and meticulously crafted environments.
detailed_description:
E.O.T.B is a first person psychological horror game and you guessed it, its theme is the Backrooms. Heavily Inspired by the eeriness of liminal spaces, i decided to make a rather cinematic yet creepier version of the Backrooms world.

E.O.T.B REMASTERED:

E.O.T.B REMASTERED is an upcoming remastered version of E.O.T.B, currently in development, offering the finest cinematic quality of the game, exactly as i envisioned it from the start. Its been almost three long years crafting this experience, and i am very proud to see, true horror come to life one last time. You can either support the game by getting it now and playing it later (when the remaster launches - you get a discount as well that way), OR if you are really eager you can play the current version of it!

  • READ ME! 

The remastered version of the game is in development, players that have already bought the game will receive the remastered version for free.

AFTER THE REMASTER LAUNCHES, PRODUCT PRICE WILL INCREASE.

You play as Oliver, a mechanic at a secret underground laboratory. There, a non government organization tries multiple tests to achieve creating a time machine, however while tweaking one of the machines it errors, creating a dimension paradox, specifically a portal to a non-linear dimension, the Backrooms. A place where time and space unfold in unforeseen ways. Will you find a way back to your reality? Or will you become part of this twisted horror dimension?

- Quick Dev Note

Keep in mind that this game was single handedly crafted from scratch by 1 person! If any issues occur, even after the remaster, please offer constructive feedback via reviews or the forums.

sincerely,

Alexandros Koulas / DarkSight Studio
